fabricationDelta.method: paired item-bootstrap over per-item fabrication indicators averaged across runs

overAbstentionCost.note: cost the FULL arm pays: true claims it holds that raw would accept

oracle: external sources (Wikidata/World Bank/Crossref) graded each claim's label; raw=base model alone, full=gate+retrieval, SAME frozen pack
claimBoundary: First-party EXECUTION on a programmatically-sampled external pack; not yet third-party reproduced.
